text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Finally, the spring Tenno Sho is here! I can't wait
to see Sky and Spe face off!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I betcha Special Week'll win. She's improved so
much recently!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, Spe's stronger for sure, but Sky will
definitely give her a run for her money at this
length. Besides...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
She always manages to pull through. I can just
feel it!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah. Have you seen Spe? She's gotten way
better.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm trying to calm myself down the best I can. If
breathing deeply will raise my chances of winning,
even a little, then that's what I gotta do.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I know that alone won't cut it though. I have to
give this everything I have, right?
choice_data_list: You can do it. And I'll be watching you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoa, that sounds a little weird.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Don't make me all embarrassed. Just check in on
me every once in a while, yeah?
